title: Convert Text List to CSV
cap_description: Convert a list of textable values to CSV format
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a flat list of text values into CSV format. Use this when downstream processing expects CSV but the upstream produces a plain text list.

## Inputs

A list of textable string values.

## Outputs

A CSV file. Each list item becomes a row (or a cell in a single-column CSV, depending on list structure).

## Notes

- If the list items are themselves comma-separated records, the output will be multi-column CSV. Otherwise each item maps to a single cell.
- For the reverse, use [Convert CSV to Text List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:csv;list;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable").

args.arg_description: List of textable values to convert
